mapper.select: SELECT id , consult_date , userkey , consult_data , concern1 , concern2 , product , significant , etc FROM tb_consult_info where userkey = #{userKey}

SELECT id , consult_date , userkey , consult_data , concern1 , concern2 , product , significant , etc , features , consult_number FROM _20240604_tb_consult_info where userkey = #{memberId} AND consult_number = #{consultNumber}
SELECT code , description , value FROM tb_significant_group
mapper.update: UPDATE _20240604_tb_consult_info SET consult_date = #{consultDate}, consult_data = #{consultData}, concern1 = #{concern1}, concern2 = #{concern2}, product = #{product}, significant = #{significant}, etc = #{etc}, features = #{features} WHERE userkey = #{memberId} AND id = #{consultNumber}
